title: Prompt QA in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger prompt qa in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Prompt QA in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Prompt QA in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good prompt qa in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Prompt QA in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
